mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM( SELECT ROLE_ID AS roleId ,ROLE_NM AS roleNm ,ROLE_DESC AS roleDesc ,BASIC_MENU_ID AS basicMenuId ,@rownum := @rownum + 1 AS rn
FROM TBROLEBS WHERE 1=1
AND ROLE_ID like CONCAT('%',#{roleId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND ROLE_NM like CONCAT('%',#{roleNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND ROLE_DESC like CONCAT('%',#{roleDesc, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND BASIC_MENU_ID like CONCAT('%',#{basicMenuId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
order by ROLE_ID ) p , (SELECT @rownum := 0) r where p.rn > ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC}-1) * #{pageSize , jdbcType=NUMERIC}) and p.rn <= ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC} * #{pageSize, jdbcType=NUMERIC}))

SELECT count(*) cnt FROM TBROLEBS WHERE 1=1
AND ROLE_ID like CONCAT('%',#{roleId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND ROLE_NM like CONCAT('%',#{roleNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND ROLE_DESC like CONCAT('%',#{roleDesc, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND BASIC_MENU_ID like CONCAT('%',#{basicMenuId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
SELECT ROLE_ID AS roleId ,ROLE_NM AS roleNm ,ROLE_DESC AS roleDesc ,BASIC_MENU_ID AS basicMenuId FROM TBROLEBS WHERE ROLE_ID = #{roleId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
mapper.update: DELETE FROM TBROLEBS WHERE ROLE_ID = #{roleId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
